## Public-Facing Review

<!-- This repository is public. Please review changes with an external reader in mind. -->

- [ ] Language is clear, professional, and useful to readers outside the project
- [ ] No private notes, credentials, tokens, customer data, or machine-specific secrets are included
- [ ] Examples are safe to copy and do not assume access to private systems
- [ ] Links, file paths, and references are accurate

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed the diff for accidental noise or unrelated changes
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly, including headings, lists, tables, and code fences
- [ ] New or changed instructions are actionable and not overly ambiguous
- [ ] Repository structure remains easy to understand
- [ ] I added or updated supporting docs/examples when needed
